LAW & MOTION/DISCOVERY, DEPT. 301, AS TO APRIL-16-2025 HEARING RE: APPELLANT FHR SAN FRANCISCO OPERATIONS LLC'S MOTION FOR RETURN OF FUNDS; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE UNOPPOSED MOTION OF DEFENDANT FHR SAN FRANCISCO OPERATIONS, LLC FOR AN ORDER RETURNING FUNDS PREVIOUSLY POSTED AS AN UNDERTAKING IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Return Of Funds
Off Calendar Apr-16-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: APPELLANT FHR SAN FRANCISCO OPERATIONS LLC's Motion For Return Of Funds.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion of defendant FHR San Francisco Operations, LLC for an order returning funds previously posted as an undertaking is granted. The court clerk is directed to return funds in the amount of $20,301.41 plus any applicable accrued interest to defendant in the form of a check payable to "Mason Street OpCo LLC," and sent to Mason Street OpCo, LLC d/b/a Fairmont San Francisco, Attn: Ms. Jackie Dacanay, 950 Mason Street, San Francisco, CA 94108.

Defendant further seeks an order dismissing the case with prejudice. The parties may file such a request for dismissal after the undertaking is returned.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-07-2025 Vacated
